---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the FSR Calculator
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: eduardolopez-collab
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem It Solves
What workflow pain point or gap does this address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you considered and why this one is better.

## Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would improve daily use
- [ ] Blocking a workflow

## Section
- [ ] Request Details
- [ ] Service / Benchmark / Proposal
- [ ] Materials
- [ ] Vendor Bids
- [ ] Pricing Summary / Cost Breakdown
- [ ] Bid Intelligence
- [ ] FSR Log
- [ ] Print / PDF
- [ ] Data (services, cities, materials, labor rates)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references.
